name: skill-md-parallel-audit
description: Multi-agent parallel audit of SKILL.md files for HIGH-severity quality issues — missing qualifiers, terminology drift, cross-section logical contradictions, implicit premises, incomplete enumerations, and undefined terms. Sibling of claude-md-parallel-audit: same N-instance + reproducibility-threshold engine, retuned for SKILL.md (skill-specific exclusion defaults, skill-redundancy classification against other skills, frontmatter-aware triage).
